# 02.04-foundation-validation: Validate foundation libraries

## Objective
Validate the upgraded foundation library group after all three projects are retargeted.

## Scope
- Restore and build the foundation projects in dependency order.
- Run available relevant tests if any are discovered.
- Document any remaining warnings or follow-up work.

## Done When
The foundation library group restores and builds successfully, available tests are run or their absence is documented, and remaining limitations are recorded.
